---
title: "Your Name"                         # CHANGE
image: images/homepage.png
open-graph:
  image: images/card.png
toc: false
grid:
  body-width: 1300px
about:
  template: trestles
  image-width: 18em
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/yourprofile/   # CHANGE
      target: _blank
    - icon: github
      href: https://github.com/yourgithub             # CHANGE
      target: _blank
    - text: "<i class='fa-brands fa-orcid'></i>"
      href: https://orcid.org/0000-0000-0000-0000     # CHANGE
      target: _blank
    - text: "<i class='fa-brands fa-google-scholar'></i>"
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=YOURID  # CHANGE
      target: _blank
---

## Welcome to my website!

{{< include /chunks/intro.qmd >}}

#### Research Focus:

1. **Topic One**: Brief description of your first research area, linking to a relevant [project](/projects/2024-example-project).

2. **Topic Two**: Brief description of your second research area and its significance.
